title: crumbly weeknight uruguayan prawns wrap
description: A yeasty, crumbly, weeknight Uruguayan dish featuring prawns, pasta-water-emulsion, and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, served in a lotus-leaf wrap.
instructions: Heat the ayurvedic rajasic oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced palm hearts and waxy yam and saut	8 until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the peeled and deveined prawns and cook until pink and just set, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, warm the lotus-leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
To assemble the wraps, place a portion of the prawn and vegetable mixture onto the center of each wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle with a little bit of ayurvedic rajasic oil and sprinkle with sea salt and black pepper.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a neat package.
